evidence_summary: Establish the new political reality of John Carter's chieftain status and his refusal to yield his personal moral code to Thark politics. The scene must emphasize the tension between Tars Tarkas's warning regarding rank and Carter's individual resolve.

From political maneuvering to intense personal confrontation/moral declaration.
